coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 11:03 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 11:03 at 65%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 11:03 at 65%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 88% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/5. 88-88% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/5. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 11:03.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/5. Power: 88-88%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. 5:12 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:12. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 33% done. 3 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/5. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/5. 11:03 at 88%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 27 minutes of work done. 27 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 41% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 88% × 11:03. Seated, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/5. 5:12 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 58% complete. Rep 4/5. 55% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:12 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 5:12.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 5:12 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 5/5. 66% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 88% × 11:03. Then 11min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 11:03 at 88%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 88% for 11:03. Then 11min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 88% × 11:03. Seated, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 83% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 43min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 83% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 50% FTP × 11:03. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
